creator: Meyser+bugs.freebsd.org@xenet.de
text:
Am 11.02.2010 02:53, schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of textproc/p5-OpenOffice-OODoc,
>
> Please note that PR ports/143775 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/143775
>

Agreed. Can be committed.
